title: quercus baronii
intro: Quercus baronii, also known as the Chinese cork oak, is a species of deciduous tree that belongs to the beech family (Fagaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Quercus baronii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, and is also available in supplement form, including capsules and tablets.
